documentTitle: Тестовая страница доступности (полный набор нарушений WCAG)

issues.message: accesskey attribute value should be unique (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/accesskeys?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: #search-link-1

runnerExtras.description: Ensures every accesskey attribute value is unique
runnerExtras.help: accesskey attribute value should be unique

issues.message: ARIA dialog and alertdialog nodes should have an accessible name (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-dialog-name?application=axeAPI)
issues.context: Модальное окно без aria-label
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(3)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures every ARIA dialog and alertdialog node has an accessible name
runnerExtras.help: ARIA dialog and alertdialog nodes should have an accessible name

issues.message: Required ARIA attributes must be provided (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-required-attr?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(7)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
runnerExtras.help: Required ARIA attributes must be provided

issues.message: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-required-children?application=axeAPI)
issues.context: Это div с ролью row вне таблицы
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(2)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them
runnerExtras.help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

issues.message: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-required-parent?application=axeAPI)
issues.context: Это div с ролью row вне таблицы
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(2)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
runnerExtras.help: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents

issues.message: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-required-parent?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(5)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements with an ARIA role that require parent roles are contained by them
runnerExtras.help: Certain ARIA roles must be contained by particular parents

issues.message: Frames must have an accessible name (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/frame-title?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-misc-violations > div > iframe

runnerExtras.description: Ensures <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
runnerExtras.help: Frames must have an accessible name

issues.message: Images must have alternate text (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/image-alt?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-images-violations > div > img:nth-child(2)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements have alternate text or a role of none or presentation
runnerExtras.help: Images must have alternate text

issues.message: Images must have alternate text (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/image-alt?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-images-violations > div > a > img

runnerExtras.description: Ensures elements have alternate text or a role of none or presentation
runnerExtras.help: Images must have alternate text

issues.message: Form elements should have a visible label (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/label-title-only?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: #userName

runnerExtras.description: Ensures that every form element has a visible label and is not solely labeled using hidden labels, or the title or aria-describedby attributes
runnerExtras.help: Form elements should have a visible label

issues.message: Links must have discernible text (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/link-name?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-images-violations > div > a

runnerExtras.description: Ensures links have discernible text
runnerExtras.help: Links must have discernible text

issues.message: Select element must have an accessible name (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/select-name?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-forms-violations > div > select

runnerExtras.description: Ensures select element has an accessible name
runnerExtras.help: Select element must have an accessible name

issues.message: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/tabindex?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-misc-violations > div > div:nth-child(7)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
runnerExtras.help: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero

issues.message: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/tabindex?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-misc-violations > div > div:nth-child(8)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0
runnerExtras.help: Elements should not have tabindex greater than zero

issues.message: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-hidden-focus?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(9)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
runnerExtras.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

issues.message: ARIA attributes must conform to valid values (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/aria-valid-attr-value?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-aria-violations > div > div:nth-child(12)

runnerExtras.description: Ensures all ARIA attributes have valid values
runnerExtras.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid values

issues.message: IDs used in ARIA and labels must be unique (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/duplicate-id-aria?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: #duplicate-field

runnerExtras.description: Ensures every id attribute value used in ARIA and in labels is unique
runnerExtras.help: IDs used in ARIA and labels must be unique

issues.message: Frames should be tested with axe-core (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/frame-tested?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-misc-violations > div > iframe

runnerExtras.description: Ensures <iframe> and <frame> elements contain the axe-core script
runnerExtras.help: Frames should be tested with axe-core

issues.message: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/th-has-data-cells?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-tables-violations > div > table:nth-child(3)

runnerExtras.description: Ensure that <th> elements and elements with role=columnheader/rowheader have data cells they describe
runnerExtras.help: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells

issues.message: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.8/th-has-data-cells?application=axeAPI)
issues.selector: html > body > app-root > app-tables-violations > div > table:nth-child(4)

runnerExtras.description: Ensure that <th> elements and elements with role=columnheader/rowheader have data cells they describe
runnerExtras.help: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells
